mapper.select:
SELECT p.program_id, p.category, p.thumb AS thumb, p.title, p.price, p.workshop_id, w.name AS workshopName, w.profile_img AS profileImg, w.address, user_wish.created_at AS createdAt, user_wish.updated_at AS updatedAt,
wish_counts.active AS active,
IFNULL(stats.avgRating, 0.00) AS averageRating, IFNULL(stats.reviewCount, 0) AS countReview,
wish_counts.countWish AS countWish
FROM wish AS user_wish JOIN program AS p ON user_wish.program_id = p.program_id JOIN workshop AS w ON p.workshop_id = w.workshop_id
LEFT JOIN ( -- [리뷰 통계 서브쿼리 - stats] SELECT s.program_id, AVG(r.rating) AS avgRating, COUNT(r.review_id) AS reviewCount FROM review AS r JOIN reservation AS res ON r.reservation_id = res.reservation_id JOIN schedule AS s ON res.schedule_id = s.schedule_id GROUP BY s.program_id ) AS stats ON p.program_id = stats.program_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT program_id, active, COUNT(wish_id) AS countWish FROM wish WHERE active = TRUE GROUP BY program_id ) AS wish_counts ON p.program_id = wish_counts.program_id
WHERE user_wish.user_id = #{userId} AND user_wish.active = TRUE ORDER BY updatedAt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wish (user_id, program_id, active, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{programId}, TRUE, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE wish SET active = #{active}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND program_id = #{programId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wish WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND program_id = #{programId}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS countWish FROM wish WHERE program_id = #{programId} AND active = TRUE

SELECT w.wish_id, p.title, p.workshop_id, u.name, w.created_at,w.user_id, w.active FROM program p JOIN wish w USING(program_id) JOIN user u USING(user_id) where w.active = true AND program_id = #{programId};

SELECT w.wish_id, w.user_id, w.program_id, w.active, ws.workshop_id FROM wish w JOIN program p ON w.program_id = p.program_id JOIN workshop ws ON p.workshop_id = ws.workshop_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND ws.workshop_id = #{workshopId}
